strategyResults.details: Zero TS errors incl. new facts.ts.
0 errors; 2 pre-existing warnings in eval-persist.test.ts (not a sprint file).
5/5 facts tests pass; full suite 2144/2144 pass.

criteriaResults.evidence: FactStore class with insertFact/getActiveFacts(scope,subject?,predicate?)/getFact/invalidateFact/close; ctor takes dbPath incl ':memory:'; no Date.now/new Date in executable store code (only JSDoc).
CREATE TABLE has all 11 columns; idx_facts_sp(scope,subject,predicate) + idx_facts_active(scope,t_invalidated); all SQL parameterized with ? placeholders.
CLI add/list/show/invalidate exercised end-to-end against dist incl unknown-id (friendly msg, exitCode 1, no throw); facts.db cleaned up.

summary: Sprint 1 passes all 7 criteria with independent verification. FactStore is pure (no wall-clock in store), fully parameterized, deterministic ids. Full suite 2144/2144 pass, zero regressions; CLI exercised end-to-end including error path. Note: the generator's hypothesized pre-existing scanner.test.ts failure did not reproduce — evaluator saw all scanner tests pass.
